name: invoice
description: Create Stripe invoices directly — use when user says 'create invoice' or 'draft invoice' with line items and amounts
author: CupBots
intent: Create draft or send Stripe invoices directly with line items and amounts, send draft invoices, check invoice status. Use this when the user says 'create invoice', 'draft invoice', 'send invoice', or provides line items with amounts to invoice a client
not_intent: Log billable hours or time entries (use /bill), track work done (use /bill), convert logged bill items to invoices (use /bill invoice)

marketplace.tagline: Create and send Stripe invoices from chat
